productDisplayName: Jockey SP-OW Men Green Innerwear Vest SP11
description: Style Note This muscle tee from jockey is a must have summer essential that can be worn for all your training sessions or just when you are chilling out on the weekends. The soft moisture management fabric gives you a comfortable feel and the vibrant colours are simply fashionable. Pair this tee with track pants and training shoes or shorts and sandals Product Details Green sleeveless T-shirt that has a crew neck, stretch fabric that ensures freedom of movement and comfort, mesh panels on the front at the sides and reflective print on the chest Material and Care Cotton/elastane Machine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations
